title: Dealix Profitability Input (V10)
description: One offer-level profitability record. All figures are EXAMPLE / MANUAL assumptions. No real revenue figures are stored in the repository.

delivery_cost.description: Estimated delivery cost (founder/contractor time + tools + rework) (assumption).

units.description: Number of units assumed in the scenario.

is_assumption.description: Must be true. Every figure is an explicit assumption, never real revenue.
